tasks.title: Complete Security Fundamentals
tasks.description: docs/interview/shared/04-security/ contains comprehensive security theory: expanded 01-security-fundamentals.md, plus new 02-cryptography-and-protocols.md (symmetric/asymmetric encryption, hashing, TLS/SSL handshake, PKI, digital signatures) and 03-web-security-owasp.md (OWASP Top 10 2021, XSS, CSRF, SQL injection, SSRF, with interview Q&A).
steps: wc -l docs/interview/shared/04-security/*.md shows 3 files totaling 2000+ lines
grep -c 'Việt|tiếng Việt|Giải thích|Tổng Quan' docs/interview/shared/04-security/*.md shows Vietnamese content in each file
grep -c '[Junior]|[Mid]|[Senior]' docs/interview/shared/04-security/*.md shows difficulty markers in each file

tasks.title: Create Software Engineering Fundamentals
tasks.description: docs/interview/shared/05-software-engineering/ contains 3 substantive files replacing the current stub: 01-solid-and-design-patterns.md (SOLID principles, GoF patterns), 02-architecture-styles.md (monolith vs microservices vs serverless, event-driven, hexagonal, DDD), and 03-sdlc-and-practices.md (Agile/Scrum/Kanban, testing pyramid, CI/CD, code review, tech debt). The existing software-engineering-theory.md stub is deleted.
steps: find docs/interview/shared/05-software-engineering/ -name '*.md' -exec wc -l {} + shows 3+ substantive files each 500+ lines

tasks.title: Expand Shared System Design and Database Theory
tasks.description: shared/02-system-design/ has new caching-patterns.md and replication-partitioning.md. shared/03-database/ has new 02-indexing-and-optimization.md and 03-nosql-and-newsql.md.

tasks.title: Create Data Structures Theory
tasks.description: shared/01-cs-fundamentals/data-structures-theory.md exists covering arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues, hash tables, trees (BST, AVL, Red-Black, B-tree, trie), heaps, graphs, and advanced structures (skip list, bloom filter, union-find) with operations, complexities, use cases, and interview Q&A.

tasks.title: Create AI and Agents Knowledge Section
tasks.description: shared/06-ai-and-agents/ directory with 6 files: 01-ml-fundamentals.md, 02-llm-and-transformers.md, 03-agent-patterns.md, 04-rag-and-embeddings.md, 05-ai-engineering-practice.md, 06-ai-system-design.md covering the complete AI knowledge required for 2025-2026 interviews.
steps: grep -c 'Việt|tiếng Việt|Giải thích' docs/interview/shared/06-ai-and-agents/*.md shows Vietnamese content in each file

tasks.title: Deduplicate FE-Track Theoretical Foundations
tasks.description: All 9 16-theoretical-foundations-*.md files in fe-track/09-advanced-topics/ are converted to cross-reference stubs (< 30 lines each) pointing to corresponding shared/ files.

depends_on: Expand Shared System Design and Database Theory

tasks.title: Expand BE-Track System Design
tasks.description: be-track/04-be-system-design/ has 2 new files: 03-advanced-problems.md (6+ additional system design problems) and 04-distributed-patterns.md (saga, circuit breaker, CQRS, event sourcing, service mesh, distributed tracing, idempotency).

tasks.title: Add Go Advanced Patterns and DevOps Basics
tasks.description: be-track/01-golang/08-advanced-patterns.md covers context propagation, advanced error handling, table-driven tests, benchmark testing, pprof profiling. be-track/06-devops-infrastructure.md covers Docker, Kubernetes basics, CI/CD, monitoring, logging, IaC.

tasks.title: Create Interview Market Overview
tasks.description: docs/interview/00-interview-market-overview.md covers current interview trends 2025-2026, comparison of processes at all 6 target companies, AI-assisted interviews shift, live coding vs take-home trends, system design expectations, priority matrix by company, and preparation strategy.

tasks.title: Create Company Interview Guides
tasks.description: shared/07-company-guides/ directory with 6 files (01-google.md through 06-zalo-vng.md), each covering company overview, interview process, technical focus areas, system design expectations, behavioral criteria, preparation advice, common questions, and study order references.

tasks.title: Update Table of Contents and Cross-References
tasks.description: 00-table-of-contents.md updated with all new sections. Cross-references added to existing files. Study roadmaps (fe-track/00-study-roadmap.md, be-track/00-study-roadmap.md) updated to reference new content.

depends_on: Expand Shared System Design and Database Theory
Create AI and Agents Knowledge Section
Add Go Advanced Patterns and DevOps Basics

nonGoals: Coding challenge repositories or LeetCode solution banks
